lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. What are you up to?

lines.speaker: Morten Holdstrom
lines.text: Ah, today is a surströmming day! The herring I buried six months ago is ready to be dug up.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Eughr! What are you going to do with it?

lines.speaker: Morten Holdstrom
lines.text: Eat it, of course! It will be fermented just-right by now.

lines.speaker: Morten Holdstrom
lines.text: Hmmm, tasty. I'm guessing you don't want to come round and try it?
